name: Swingeasy Golf Club - Costa Mesa
address: 2960 Airway Ave STE A-102, Costa Mesa, CA 92626
about: Swingeasy Golf Club - Costa Mesa is a modern country club experience that blends virtual golf with social and competitive play. The venue features private, fully-equipped bays where guests can book sessions to play 18 holes on various courses or practice with advanced tracking technology. Operating on a mixed pricing model, it offers both hourly public rates and membership options, making it accessible for one-time players and regulars alike. The space is designed for groups, with each booking including a private suite furnished with comfortable seating, large TVs, and the ability to watch sporting events during play.
why_golfers_like_it: Every booking is in a fully private and spacious suite with closed doors for privacy
Advanced analytics and tracking software for compelling range sessions
Ability to play 18 holes at a wide range of US courses in under 2 hours
Option to watch sports on TVs in Picture in Picture mode while golfing
Flexible pricing allows for one-off sessions or monthly memberships

food_and_drink.notes: Guests are welcome to bring outside food; soft drinks are available for purchase
No mention of alcohol service on site; BYOB appears to be allowed

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced tracking software mentioned for range sessions
Branded as a simulator partner for virtual golf experiences

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Rental clubs are available for members and guests, but bringing your own set is recommended for a better experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, guests are welcome to bring any outside food. Soft drinks are available for purchase, but no alcohol is mentioned as being served on site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The recommended time is about 40 minutes per golfer to finish a full 18 holes, though this can vary based on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue accommodates families with its private suites that can host multiple guests, and it offers a social environment for group play.
